meta.title: Wan 2.6 AI Video Generator | Alibaba | OpenCreator
meta.description: Create stunning videos with Wan 2.6 from Alibaba. Up to 15-second multi-shot videos with native audio sync, lip-sync, and character consistency. Try free on OpenCreator.

hero.description: Wan 2.6 is Alibaba's latest video generation model featuring reference-to-video generation, multi-shot storytelling, and native audio-visual synchronization. Upload character references with appearance and voice to generate new scenes with clone-level consistency. Up to 15-second videos.

features.title: Key Features
features.subtitle: Discover what makes Wan 2.6 Alibaba's most advanced video model

multiShot.title: Multi-Shot Storytelling
multiShot.description: Generate complete narrative sequences with multiple camera angles. The model automatically plans shot transitions while maintaining consistency in characters, environment, and lighting.

audioSync.title: Native Audio Sync
audioSync.description: Characters speak with accurate mouth shapes and timing. Generate visuals that match audio tracks frame by frame with precise lip-sync.

consistency.title: Clone-Level Consistency
consistency.description: Reference subjects maintain their exact appearance across shots - near-identical preservation of facial features, clothing, body proportions, and distinctive characteristics.

duration.title: Extended Duration
duration.description: Generate up to 15-second videos in a single run - enough for complete narrative arcs, product showcases, and social media content.

referenceToVideo.title: Reference-to-Video Generation
referenceToVideo.description: Upload a character reference video with appearance and voice, then use text prompts to generate new scenes starring that same character with consistent visuals and audio.

dualSubject.title: Dual-Subject Interaction
dualSubject.description: Supports 1-3 reference videos for single-subject generation or complex dual-subject interactions within the same scene.

resolution.title: High Resolution Output
resolution.description: Generate videos in 480p to 1080p resolution with 24fps frame rate, suitable for social media and professional production.

gallery.title: See It In Action
gallery.subtitle: Real examples and use cases created with Wan 2.6 on OpenCreator

social.title: Social Media Content
social.useCase: Create scroll-stopping short-form videos for TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts.

marketing.title: Marketing Videos
marketing.useCase: Produce professional marketing videos with narration, dialogue, and product showcases.

ecommerce.title: E-commerce Showcase
ecommerce.useCase: Generate product videos from unboxing to usage with synchronized audio descriptions.

storytelling.title: Multi-Shot Stories
storytelling.useCase: Tell complete stories with beginning, middle, and end using multiple camera angles.

dialogue.title: Character Dialogue
dialogue.useCase: Create interviews, scripted performances, and comedy skits with multi-character dialogue.

music.title: Music Performance
music.useCase: Generate music videos with singing, rap, and instrumental performances with lip-sync.

specs.subtitle: Everything you need to know about Wan 2.6 capabilities

comparison.subtitle: See how Wan 2.6 compares to other leading AI video models

pricing.note: Credits vary by duration and resolution. Subscribe to save more.

0.question: What is Wan 2.6 and who developed it?
0.answer: Wan 2.6 is Alibaba's latest AI video generation model released in December 2025. It features multi-shot storytelling, native audio-visual synchronization, and clone-level character consistency for professional video production.

1.question: What types of content can I create with Wan 2.6?
1.answer: Wan 2.6 excels at creating social media content, marketing videos, e-commerce showcases, multi-shot stories, character dialogues, and music performances. It supports both text-to-video and image-to-video generation.

2.question: How long can Wan 2.6 videos be?
2.answer: Wan 2.6 can generate videos up to 15 seconds in a single run. This is enough for complete narrative arcs, product showcases, and most social media content requirements.

3.question: Does Wan 2.6 support audio generation?
3.answer: Yes! Wan 2.6 features native audio-visual synchronization including speech with accurate lip-sync, sound effects, and ambient sounds. It supports English, Chinese, and other major languages.

4.question: How many reference videos can I use?
4.answer: Wan 2.6 supports 1-3 reference videos. Single references work for consistent subject generation, while multiple references enable dual-subject interactions or complex scene guidance.

5.question: How does Wan 2.6 compare to other AI video models?
5.answer: Wan 2.6 stands out for its multi-shot storytelling capability, native audio sync, and extended 15-second duration. While Veo 3 offers similar audio features, Wan 2.6 excels in character consistency and multi-shot narratives.

6.question: Can I try Wan 2.6 for free on OpenCreator?
6.answer: Yes! New users receive free credits upon registration, which can be used to try Wan 2.6. This lets you test multi-shot storytelling and audio generation before committing to a subscription.

7.question: What is Wan 2.6 multishot and how does it work?
7.answer: Wan 2.6 multishot is an intelligent feature that automatically splits your prompt into multiple coherent shots within a single video. It maintains character, style, and narrative consistency across all shots without manual editing.

8.question: How much does Wan 2.6 cost on OpenCreator?
8.answer: Credits vary by duration and resolution. The pricing section on this page shows the most up-to-date credit cost. Subscribers enjoy additional discounts. New users can try Wan 2.6 with free registration credits.

9.question: What resolutions and aspect ratios does Wan 2.6 support?
9.answer: Wan 2.6 supports up to 1080p resolution with common aspect ratios (16:9, 9:16, 1:1). Choose based on your target platform: 16:9 for YouTube, 9:16 for TikTok/Reels, 1:1 for Instagram.

10.question: How do I choose between Wan 2.6 and Veo 3?
10.answer: Both excel at audio-visual generation. Choose Wan 2.6 for multi-shot storytelling, longer clips (up to 15s), and character consistency. Choose Veo 3 for single-shot cinematic realism and advanced camera controls.

11.question: How do I choose between Wan 2.6 and Sora 2?
11.answer: Wan 2.6 offers native audio sync and multi-shot narratives. Sora 2 emphasizes physics realism and visual fidelity. If you need dialogue and multi-character scenes, start with Wan 2.6. For cinematic single shots, try Sora 2.

12.question: Does Wan 2.6 support text-to-video and image-to-video?
12.answer: Yes. Wan 2.6 supports both workflows. Use image-to-video for stronger character/style anchoring; use text-to-video for maximum creative freedom. Both support multi-shot generation and native audio.
